title: Small Bin Bags 5L, 500 Pack Pedal Bin Liners, Clear White Plastic Bin Bags,42cm*50cm,Bulk Supply for Office, Hotel, Restaurant, School
features: 【Bin Bags Size】: This 5L bin liner set provides you with 500 garbage bags, each measuring 42 × 50 cm (16.5 × 20 inches), making it the perfect fit for various small pedal bins
【Easy-Tear Design】:Perforated tear points are integrated into the bag seam, allowing clean and effortless separation of individual bags without tearing or damaging adjacent ones
【Bulk Supply for Business】Perfect for commercial use, this pack of 500 clear plastic bin liners is designed for offices, hotels, restaurants, schools, and more

【Optimized Dimensions】 Unlike standard 5L bin bags on the market, our bags feature an extended 50cm length for easier waste disposal. This design allows them to hold more contents comfortably and reduces the risk of overflow

【Durable & Leak-Proof Construction】Made from high-density polyethylene (HDPE), these bags are highly resistant to punctures and offer exceptional toughness. The leak-proof bottom features a reinforced circular seal for reliable containment
